name: Atombit
blog_profile: Atombit operates through specialized sub-brands focusing on AI-driven analytics and experience intelligence, primarily serving financial services clients across EU and India. Their methodology centers on proprietary data science and GenAI capabilities rather than established XM platforms like Qualtrics or Medallia. Delivery is consultancy-led with embedded analytics teams. Thought leadership emphasizes predictive customer behavior modeling and real-time experience optimization through custom-built AI pipelines.

name: Sovanta
blog_profile: Sovanta positions as the premier bridge between SAP operational data and Qualtrics experience data, with deep expertise in embedded analytics within SAP workflows. Their AI approach centers on operationalizing experience insights through SAP BTP integrations and AI agents that automate CX response actions. Delivery model is enterprise consulting with strong DACH roots expanding across EU. Thought leadership themes focus on closing the experience-operations gap, SAP S/4HANA migration opportunities, and AI-augmented decision making for experience management.

name: New Metrics
blog_profile: New Metrics is the dominant Qualtrics implementation partner in the GCC region, specializing in government and public sector citizen experience transformation. Their methodology blends VOC program design with national digital transformation frameworks (Vision 2030, UAE digital government). Delivery model is hands-on consulting with deep Arabic-language cultural expertise. Thought leadership emphasizes CX maturity models for government entities, citizen journey mapping, and data-driven policy feedback loops.

name: Ipsos CX
blog_profile: Ipsos CX leverages its global research infrastructure to deliver large-scale CX measurement and advisory programs, combining survey-based VOC with behavioral analytics. Their AI approach is research-methodology-driven, focusing on advanced analytics, predictive modeling, and synthetic data techniques rather than platform-native AI features. Delivery model combines managed research services with strategic consulting. Thought leadership centers on CX ROI proof points, loyalty driver analysis, and cross-industry benchmarking at global scale.

name: commonFont
blog_profile: commonFont is a US-based Qualtrics specialist focused heavily on banking and financial services CX implementations. Their methodology emphasizes rapid Qualtrics deployment with deep platform configuration expertise, particularly around experience orchestration and AI-driven closed-loop programs. Delivery model is implementation-focused consulting with strong post-deployment optimization services. Thought leadership themes include financial services CX benchmarking, regulatory-compliant VOC programs, and leveraging Qualtrics AI agents for automated customer recovery workflows.

name: Higher Oak
blog_profile: Higher Oak is a UK/EU-based Qualtrics Platinum Partner historically focused on enterprise experience management implementations across public and private sectors. Their methodology centers on Qualtrics platform best practices with program design consulting. Delivery model is consulting-led implementation with managed services components. However, extended content silence makes current strategic direction difficult to assess — their thought leadership positioning may be undergoing revision or the firm may be experiencing operational transitions.

name: Lukkap
blog_profile: Lukkap is a Spain/LATAM-focused experience consultancy delivering platform-agnostic CX and EX transformation programs. Their methodology combines customer journey mapping, organizational change management, and culture transformation with a strong human-centered design approach. Delivery model is strategic consulting without deep technology platform alignment, making them a methodology competitor rather than a platform competitor. Thought leadership themes include employee experience as CX driver, journey-based transformation, and experience-led organizational redesign.

name: Izo
blog_profile: Izo is the largest Qualtrics-certified CX consultancy across Iberoamerica, operating in 15+ Spanish-speaking markets with deep enterprise relationships. Their methodology combines VOC program design with CX strategy consulting, customer journey optimization, and digital experience transformation. Delivery model spans strategic advisory through Qualtrics implementation and managed services. Thought leadership focuses on CX maturity frameworks, NPS program evolution, and digital transformation of customer journeys across banking, telecom, and retail verticals in Latin American markets.

name: Globant
blog_profile: Globant is a global technology services company whose Connected Experiences Studio addresses CX through engineering-led digital transformation rather than traditional XM platform consulting. Their AI approach is engineering-first, building custom AI solutions and integrating generative AI into enterprise applications rather than configuring platform-native AI features. Delivery model is large-scale technology delivery with thousands of engineers. Thought leadership emphasizes AI engineering at scale, enterprise GenAI adoption frameworks, and technology-driven transformation, with CX as one domain among many rather than a specialized practice.

name: GemSeek
blog_profile: GemSeek fue absorbida por Accenture Song. Su propuesta original era analytics de CX con foco en predicción de churn y modelado de lealtad — un enfoque data science-first dentro del espacio CX. Sin actividad independiente desde la adquisición.

name: Vocé Group
blog_profile: No digital presence available for analysis. Unable to assess methodology, AI approach, delivery model, or thought leadership themes. This competitor may operate through personal networks, referral-only channels, or may no longer be actively competing in the CX market.

name: Zill Consulting

name: Act XM
blog_profile: No digital presence available for analysis. Unable to assess methodology, AI approach, delivery model, or thought leadership themes. This competitor may operate under a different brand name, through personal networks, or may no longer be actively competing.

name: Acceleration Strategy
blog_profile: Acceleration Strategy is a Canada/US Qualtrics partner specializing in enterprise XM program design and optimization with strong marquee client references. Their methodology emphasizes strategic XM program architecture, Qualtrics platform optimization, and AI agent deployment strategies for experience orchestration. Delivery model combines strategic advisory with hands-on Qualtrics implementation and program management. Thought leadership themes center on post-X4 AI capabilities, experience orchestration best practices, and enterprise CX ROI demonstration, particularly across financial services, gaming, and travel/hospitality verticals.
